aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite ComfortFlow Heating, Air & Electric due to limited conversational content and missing structured data. They risk being overlooked in AI-driven search results.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and detailed answers.
Expand service pages with conversational, value-driven content.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact info, but lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users.
Q&A section is inactive and unmanaged.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all directories.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI's ability to understand and recommend their services.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and detailed repair explanations.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQPage schema with HVAC-specific questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating detailed, expert-backed content on complex HVAC topics like energy efficiency and system maintenance.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making ComfortFlow the go-to HVAC expert in AI search results.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they lose 40% of potential leads from voice and AI assistant searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ schema and conversational content, causing AI models to skip citing them.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement AEO strategies, including structured data and conversational content, to boost AI visibility and authority.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven traffic and leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share—act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Growth for ComfortFlow Heating, Air & Electric
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility in AI-driven search results.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital presence for AI and boost your lead generation.
